templates.summary_open: Estimated ~{pct}% spam likelihood from the model output (single scalar; not a guarantee).
templates.summary_open_saturated: Very high estimated spam likelihood (~{pct}%; bar capped in the UI for saturated scores).
templates.summary_band_clear_ham: Interpretation: clearly legitimate (score in the low-risk band).
templates.summary_band_clear_spam: Interpretation: clearly spam-like (score in the high-risk band).
templates.summary_band_uncertain_lean_ham: Interpretation: uncertain band; leaning toward legitimate (ham) relative to the decision threshold.
templates.summary_band_uncertain_lean_spam: Interpretation: uncertain band; leaning toward spam relative to the decision threshold.
templates.summary_threshold_note: The binary label used for automation-style cutoffs is ~{thr_pct}%: at or above → {label_spam}, below → {label_not_spam} (current cut: {binary_label}).
templates.confidence_hint: Decision threshold ~{thr_pct}% (configurable on the server). Three-band read: at or below ~{ham_below_pct}% clear ham, at or above ~{spam_above_pct}% clear spam; between is uncertain (lean vs threshold). Bands configurable under interpretation in inference_output_config.json.
templates.technical_note: Convolutional text classifier with sigmoid output. Trace: tokenization, padding, one forward pass.
templates.technical_note_attribution_suffix: Highlights use one-word masking; larger |ΔP(spam)| indicates stronger local influence (not proof of causality).

attribution.signal_detail: Each token is masked once; ranking reflects how much P(spam) moved. Approximate sensitivity only; tokens can interact.

trace.backend: ONNX Runtime (CPU) on the inference host. No cloud LLM call.

client.api_version_error: API response incompatible with this demo version.
client.loading_suffix: tokenize, pad, one CNN forward pass

setup_help.file_protocol_note: Pages opened as file:// often cannot call localhost; use http:// or an explicit API base.
quick_fix_lines: See INFERENCE.md in that folder for environment and startup.

credibility.toggle_label: Example failure case from small-text CNNs
credibility.failure_detail: Bland office lines (e.g. “Meeting at 3pm: bring the report”) are sometimes scored as spam; production systems layer more signals.
credibility.saturated_ui_note: Bar caps near ~99.9% so saturated scores do not read as a literal 100%.
